When to use:

Plan and execute Vue and ecosystem migrations across major versions, Vue Router, Pinia, Vite, and testing libraries. Use when upgrading Vue 2 to 3, migrating Options API to Composition API, updating Vue Router 4+, or modernizing TypeScript and ESLint configs tied to Vue upgrades.
